mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `user` (username, password, nickname, avatar_url, role, status) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{avatarUrl}, #{role}, #{status})
INSERT INTO buyer_profile (user_id, real_name, phone) VALUES (#{userId}, #{realName}, #{phone})
INSERT INTO merchant_profile (user_id, shop_name, business_license_no, contact_name, contact_phone) VALUES (#{userId}, #{shopName}, #{businessLicenseNo}, #{contactName}, #{contactPhone})
mapper.select: SELECT shop_name AS shopName, business_license_no AS businessLicenseNo, contact_name AS contactName, contact_phone AS contactPhone FROM merchant_profile WHERE user_id = #{userId}
